patch_validation.comment: Symlink checks precede `is_file()` in both code_dir and tests_dir loops; this avoids following symlink targets before the skip decision.

patch_validation.evidence: src/polybuild/phases/phase_5_triade.py:653-655 `for p in sorted(root.rglob("*")):` / `if p.is_symlink() or not p.is_file()`
patch_validation.comment: _tree_hash skips symlinks before `is_file()` and `read_bytes()`, so it no longer reads symlink targets.

patch_validation.evidence: src/polybuild/adapters/openrouter.py:111-129 `try: content = data["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]` ... `if content is None`; src/polybuild/phases/phase_4_audit.py:287-298 same guard
patch_validation.comment: The generate path and Phase 4 direct OR branch now handle malformed `choices` and null content gracefully. The same issue remains in `OpenRouterAdapter.smoke_test`; see missing findings.

patch_validation.evidence: src/polybuild/adapters/openrouter.py:287 `if not isinstance(rel_path, str) or not isinstance(source, str):`; src/polybuild/adapters/openrouter.py:304 `if not abs_path.is_relative_to(worktree_resolved):`
patch_validation.comment: LLM-controlled paths are type-checked, resolved, and constrained to the resolved worktree before writes.
Critic evidence_path, fixer_output, and verifier feedback are sanitized, but the fixer prompt still re-injects the LLM-controlled evidence path unsanitized.

patch_validation.evidence: src/polybuild/orchestrator/__init__.py:55-63 comment documents same event-loop-thread guarantee and `_SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TASKS` only
patch_validation.comment: The unused lock is absent and the comment no longer claims lock-based protection.
The EXDEV fallback is not atomic: it copies directly onto `target`, despite the comment claiming an `os.replace` step. This violates the checkpoint atomicity invariant if the fallback ever runs.
The synthetic raw-prompt run_id is now deterministic across processes.
Malformed or schema-invalid `self_metrics.json` falls back to estimated metrics instead of crashing.
The prompt is now separated from Codex CLI options.

patch_validation.evidence: src/polybuild/phases/phase_3b_grounding.py:76 `from packaging.requirements import InvalidRequirement, Requirement`; pyproject.toml:10-18 dependencies omit `packaging`
patch_validation.comment: The parser choice is semantically correct, but it introduces an undeclared runtime dependency. A minimal install can now fail in Phase 3b with `ModuleNotFoundError`.
Slash-based detection misclassifies `mistral/devstral-2` as OpenRouter despite the ADR/direct adapter, and newly slash-based OR providers still do not enter the direct HTTP branch.
The placeholder-integrity opt-out now uses the debug-specific env var, while `POLYBUILD_PROMPTS_DIR` remains only a location override.
AnalyzerEngine is cached at module level after successful initialization.
Local gate subprocesses now run in a new session with a constrained environment.
Valid JSON with the wrong top-level shape no longer crashes `data.get(...)`.

missing_p0_p1.title: Fixer prompt still receives unsanitized auditor-controlled evidence path
missing_p0_p1.rationale: Patch 5 sanitized the Critic evidence path but missed the Fixer prompt. A malicious `Finding.evidence.file` can still carry prompt-injection syntax into the Critic-Fixer loop.
missing_p0_p1.patch_hint: Use `sanitize_prompt_context(str(finding.evidence.file) if finding.evidence else "n/a")` for every `evidence_path` format argument.

missing_p0_p1.title: OR-bound detection and actual OR routing disagree
missing_p0_p1.rationale: The key gate treats most slash voices as OR-bound, but the HTTP branch still only handles `deepseek/` and `x-ai/`; `qwen/`, `z-ai/`, `minimax/`, etc. fall through to `get_builder()` and raise `Unknown voice_id`. It also falsely gates `mistral/devstral-2` as OpenRouter.
missing_p0_p1.patch_hint: Centralize routing with `is_openrouter_routed()`/adapter metadata, explicitly exclude `mistral/`, and route all OR slugs through `OpenRouterAdapter` or the direct Phase 4 HTTP path.

missing_p0_p1.title: Checkpoint EXDEV fallback is non-atomic
missing_p0_p1.rationale: The fallback writes directly to the final checkpoint path with `shutil.copy2`, exposing readers to partial content and contradicting the project invariant of tmp-plus-rename checkpoints.
missing_p0_p1.patch_hint: Copy to a sibling temporary file on the target filesystem, then use `os.replace(tmp_on_target, target)` and unlink the original temp.

missing_p0_p1.title: PEP 508 parser adds undeclared runtime dependency
missing_p0_p1.rationale: `packaging.requirements.Requirement` is imported at runtime, but `packaging` is absent from `pyproject.toml` dependencies, so Phase 3b can fail in a clean install.
missing_p0_p1.patch_hint: Add `packaging>=23` to `[project].dependencies` or use a dependency already guaranteed by the runtime.

missing_p0_p1.title: OpenRouter structured payload shape is still partially unvalidated
missing_p0_p1.rationale: After `json.loads`, `_parse_response` assumes `data` is a dict, `files` is a dict, and `self_metrics` is a dict. Valid JSON such as `[]` or `{ "files": [] }` can still crash the adapter.
missing_p0_p1.patch_hint: Mirror Phase 4's `isinstance(data, dict)` guard and validate `files`/`self_metrics` as mappings before `.items()` or `.get()`.

missing_p0_p1.title: OpenRouter smoke_test still crashes on malformed success payloads
missing_p0_p1.rationale: `smoke_test()` directly indexes `choices[0]` and catches `KeyError` but not `IndexError` or `TypeError`; `content=None` also reaches `json.loads(None)` and raises `TypeError`.
missing_p0_p1.patch_hint: Apply the same malformed-response guard used in `generate()` and catch `IndexError`/`TypeError`.
